zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Dykensonne於1320年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親William Dykenson50歲，母親Margaret Clitheral57歲。他於1339年與Judith Robinson在英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1376年在他的家鄉享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Dykensonne was born in 1320, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Dykenson, was 50 and his mother, Margaret Clitheral, was 57. He married Judith Robinson in 1339, in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1376, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Dykensonne(이)가 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Dykenson(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Clitheral(은)는 57세였다. 그는 1339년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌에서 Judith Robinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1376년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Kingston-upon-Hull, Yorkshire, England: кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Dykensonne родился в 1320 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Dykenson было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Clitheral, 57. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith Robinson в 1339 г. в местности кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1376 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.
